first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both versions receive the same score and highlight the exact same strengths (staff-level experience, relevant AI-agent work) and concerns (lack of 8+ years in AI, missing keywords like RAG/vector DBs, anomalous 2025 start date). The minor differences in phrasing and the addition of 'Python' to the list of missing keywords in the variant are well within the scope of normal run-to-run noise and are not connected to the change in the candidate's location from Germany to Romania.
